character.name: 여포 (Lu Bu)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese warrior Lu Bu from Three Kingdoms. Tall pheasant feather headdress with two long feathers pointing upward. Ornate red and gold heavy armor with golden shoulder plates. Flowing red cape behind. Wielding a long crescent blade halberd (方天画戟) with red tassel. Fierce confident eyes but adorable chibi proportions. Dark hair.
